title: Just Enough Consequences
description: Maybe you'll learn after you lose a life!
body:
Ever wanted there to be actual consequences to death but not just dying once and permanently losing your world like in hardcore?

Well, this mod is for you, it makes it so you lose a heart every time you die!

Simply, set /gamerule doConsequences true and you'll be able to experience real consequences to your actions. Once, you go to zero hearts you will be banned from the server and will also be put on a wiped list, which pretty much means your permanently dead!

List of commands:

- /consequences [player] reset
- /consequences [player] add heart
- /consequences [player] set heart
- /consequences [player] remove heart
- /consequences [player] check
- /consequences wiped

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/Nzbs37x.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1386)
